original_snippet_context: Article describing events in Taubaté related to the Convênio, including a session of the Câmara Municipal.
relevant_quote: vindos a esta cidade para assignar o convênio sobre valorização do café.
justification: This phrase simply states the purpose of the gathering in Taubaté, mentioning the Convênio and its relation to coffee valorization without expressing an opinion on the Caixa de Conversão itself.
